title: Fig.1 in Genetic Diversity Of (Brassica Napus L.) Spring Oilseed Rape
author: Gečaitė, Loreta
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig.1. DNA fingerprints from different samples of different oilseed rape cultivars obtained by PCR with primers: OPA-01-S1-S6-'SwSavan'; OPA-04-H1-H6-'Heros'; OPA-04-U1-U6-'Ural'; OPA-09-L1- L5-'Landmark'; OPA11-M1-M6-'Maskot'. M-Gene RulerTM 100 bp DNA Ladder Plus (MBI Fermentas)
